item.title: Go me :)
item.description: Best choice ever
item.dc:creator: flipklein

item.title: March weight loss check-in
item.description: For those of you who are following, I’m just about at my goal! I’ve got about 5-8 lbs to go before I’m fully comfortable maintaining. It’s crazy looking back and seeing what I used to look like, I hardly recognize myself anymore. I want to be transparent as possible, so I will say I’ve been slacking a bit on the gym, but that’s just a part of the journey. I am interested in building a bit of muscle once I hit my goal, so I’ll take recommendations on what exercises are best for that if you all have some. For reference, I was about 210 lbs in the first photo (taken 4/26/23), and I’m 133 in the second photo (taken today).
item.dc:creator: bunniebby

item.dc:creator: deafkitten

item.title: I got a call!! Finally!!
item.description:
The shelter just called and they have some kittens for me to foster! A mama and her three newborn babies. I’ve been without kittens for four months so I am SO excited!! (Update: https://imgur.com/gallery/h1X2lOm )
Two little cream and white boys and a beautiful calico girl. They look to be about a week old.
Mama is a GORGEOUS Flame Point Siamese. I’ve never had one with her coloration before! Once I get them home, I’ll give mama a few hours to settle in before trying to take better pictures. I’m stoked!!
item.dc:creator: KittensForDays

item.dc:creator: swordscomic

item.title: Stewie the day he was born
item.description: This is Stewie when the day he was born and also the day we got him. He looks sort of yellow-ish because his mom rejected him and did not clean him after he was born. He’s all clean and comfy now, and also very loved!
item.dc:creator: elbowdeepinagoose

item.title: Still chasing the dream I cannot catch
item.description: I would love to have my own private animal rescue so no animal would be unloved or homeless or abused. As for a home for myself I would love a Hobbit house or a log cabin !
item.dc:creator: JustaRandomCanadianFemale

item.title: A Small Dump and A Request
item.description: *Edit - Thank you everyone for sending me kind words, memes, and enough monies to pay for my meds. I love all you guys so much! If you made it this far, thank you for reading. I do have but one request, I'm looking for anyone to help me out by sending a few dollars to my wonderful partner's CashApp or Venmo. I'm trying to purchase my needed medications, though I no longer have the money cause I had to put that money towards my past due on my mother's internet bill to keep it from being shut off. My partner does WFH and absolutely needs the internet to do get her job done so I made that sacrifice. I'm not in the greatest mental space and the thought of having to go through 2 weeks of painful withdrawal symptoms is pushing me to my limit. Any amount helps, if you'd like to send us any, just DM and I'll get you a link. If not, it's all good, I would appreciate an upvote to get more visibility. I've been a lurker since 2011 and finally made my account in 2016, I love this little community and I've seen you help so many people.
item.dc:creator: FrenziiTheSuccubus

item.title: It's my cake day! Enjoy some stuff I stole from Imgur
item.description:
It's dignity, Louann!
Oy! Mister Prime Minister!
Garrus is the best.
100%
Any time I had a problem, I just threw a Molotov cocktail. Then, I had a different problem!
100%
*sob*
Highly recommend the Libby app! (Or Overdrive, depending on your area.) Library ebooks and audiobooks!
100% Most Viral edit: Apparently my emoji comments didn't go through, but I am glad to have sparked such a great debate about pop, soda, coke, Pepsi, fizz, etc! Have a great day all!

item.title: when they try to pull out of your comfort zone
item.dc:creator: montsecakes

item.title: Lies are coming to an end
item.description: I had a fight with my partner for the last time. We always go in circles and make up afterwards then pretend like it's allOK. I realized in our decade together I allowed so many things that I did not agree with. Pretended to be ok with things that hurt me and chose to supress the way I felt so that they would be ok. I was OK with sacrificing my reality to keep up the image that I wasOK. I started to feel like two people, one that was helpful and another that didnt want to be around anyone. This past month I stopped lying and being honest about how I feel and it feels great to not hold it in. BUT is also changed how I feel to the core about my partner that i no longer want to even be around. I feel him trying to reconnect and I just can't accept it. I am planning to move on and feel so scared but it feels like a relief and as though it's the truth I have been avoiding. I have been trying to leave almost every year and instinctually if feels like the right thing to do. I have started to create a support group of people that just want to see me happy and it highlights even more how suppressed I feel here. I know it Is something I did and contributed to by lying for so long and it hurts me to know that it will hurt him, but I need to be honest to myself so that I don't let this happen again. I will not live a lie any longer.
item.dc:creator: OrangeMoon69

item.title: Images of Note:They know
item.description:
owo
P A I N
NOBODY can stop him
Snakes under the pillow
I found a new hat
oh no
*GLUGS A JAR OF MAYO*
G L A S S
WHAT DO YOU MEAN BY THIS CONCERNED APE???
https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Great_Male_Renunciation
Any country that uses the West African or Central African Franc is basically a part of an unofficial French Empire that France still exploits. When Guinea declared independence, France destroyed the country's infrastructure before leaving, forcing the country to pick up from square 1.
Oh they knew
WHAT'S UP MAYODRINKERS
'TWAS MAYO DRINKING DAY
Cursed clown
0w0
For Chats: http://discord.abbii.gay For Shitposts: http://tumblr.abbii.gay For srs and maybe shitposts: http://mastodon.abbii.gay also I'm twitchin' http://twitch.tv/abbiistabbii
item.dc:creator: abbiistabbii
